name: saludo
description: SALUDO — GCash-inspired e-wallet for AFP personnel (web + mobile + backend)

scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,web -c green,cyan "npm run start --prefix apps/backend" "npm run start --prefix apps/web"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix apps/backend" "npm run dev --prefix apps/web"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix apps/backend && npm install --prefix apps/web && npm install --prefix apps/mobile
